message:
feat(lipgloss): make visible_width public with comprehensive ANSI handling

Exposes the visible_width function as a public API and significantly improves
its robustness for measuring styled text display width.

## visible_width() Improvements (lipgloss/lib.rs)

Now properly handles:
- SGR sequences (e.g., \x1b[31m for colors)
- CSI sequences (e.g., \x1b[2J for clear, \x1b[10;20H for cursor)
- OSC sequences (e.g., \x1b]0;title\x07 for window titles)
- Simple escapes (e.g., \x1b7 save cursor, \x1b> keypad mode)
- Unicode width via unicode-width crate (CJK, emoji)

Performance optimization:
- Fast path for ASCII-only strings without escapes (common case)
- Inline attribute for hot path

Added comprehensive documentation with examples.

## Backend Cleanup (lipgloss/backend.rs, style.rs)

Removed duplicate internal implementations now that visible_width is public.
Consolidated width calculation to single source of truth.

## Demo App Enhancements (demo_showcase/app.rs, messages.rs)

~286 lines of new app functionality using the improved width calculations.
New message types for enhanced demo interactions.

## Huh Form Updates (huh/lib.rs)

Updated to use public visible_width for consistent text measurement
across the charmed_rust ecosystem.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
